name: Cricket
description: The Cricket is a Tier 2 neutral creature in Grounded 2. It lives in the Croquet Court and stands out for its mobility, jumps, and fast attacks.
behavior: Crickets move with short jumps and use their speed to keep pressure on targets. They do not stay still for long and do not behave erratically.
interactionWithPlayer: It usually ignores the player until damaged. If given space, it can chain attacks quickly.
interactionWithCreatures: It usually avoids long fights with other creatures, but may react if the area becomes crowded with combat.
strategy: Block its short combos and punish it when it lands. Do not give it room to chain Leap of Faith or Charged Headbutt.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: 3-Bite Combo: 88. Charged Headbutt: 112. Back Kick: 95. Leap of Faith: 120.

abilities.name: 3-Bite Combo
abilities.description: A quick string of bites that pressures stamina if you block late.

abilities.name: Charged Headbutt
abilities.description: It lunges forward and can break guard if you mistime the block.

abilities.name: Back Kick
abilities.description: It lashes out with its rear legs and can stagger you.

abilities.name: Leap of Faith
abilities.description: It leaps onto the target; dodging is safer than trying to block.

abilities.name: Screech
abilities.description: A sharp cry that accompanies its tempo changes and pressure.

abilities.name: Blocking Stance
abilities.description: It resets before going back on offense and punishes rushed approaches.
